    "name": "SELECT Statement",

    "notes": "Use to retrieve specific columns from a table"

    "notes": "Use to add new data to a table"
  },

    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to modify existing data in a table"
  },
  {

    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to delete data from a table"
  },
  {

    "units": "",

    "formula": "SELECT * FROM table1 LEFT JOIN table2 ON table1.column = table2.column;",
